trigger.command:
!watch
item: RTX 5090 GPU
target price: $1200
tolerance: 10%
max wait: 4 months
schedule: every 1 minute

agents.name: Scout
agents.responsibility: Read the approved database snapshot, then perform one bounded web-search fallback for current offers and trusted URLs.

agents.name: Inspector
agents.responsibility: Remove duplicates and unverified listings, classify fulfillment as Online or In-store / pickup, and select at most five offers.

agents.name: NemoHermes
agents.responsibility: Coordinate the handoff and format the final recommendation.

agents.name: Sage
agents.responsibility: Post the final recommendation once to #daily with feedback controls.

steps.action: NemoHermes parses the structured !watch command in #gpu-desk and stores the pending cron request.
The user selects Confirm cron; Hermes registers the one-minute schedule.
Scout reads the Supabase deal snapshot and preferences from workflow/user.md.
Scout performs one bounded current-offer search and returns evidence with direct trusted URLs.
Inspector reviews Scout evidence, rejects unsupported prices, and separates Online from In-store / pickup options.
NemoHermes creates a concise result with up to five verified entries and no internal IDs.
Sage publishes exactly one message in #daily and adds Helpful and Not helpful controls.
The post ID, timing, and feedback metadata are queued for Supabase reviews_feedback.

fallback.condition: Scout cannot verify a listing before its deadline.
fallback.output: State that no verified listing currently meets the target band; retain only official availability or stock-check links.
must_not: include job IDs or run IDs

delivery_contract.heading: Daily deals
delivery_contract.online_entry: Online, price, retailer, direct trusted product link
delivery_contract.store_entry: In-store / pickup, price, retailer, location or stock-check link
